title: チョークさんの哀しみ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot Winning Ticket running toward me, tears in
her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I... sob... I did something horrible to Mr. Chalk!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I got called on during class and had to write the answer on the blackboard...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So I thought, "All right! Let's show them how it's
done!" And I grabbed Mr. Chalk real tight. But
then...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
There was a loud crack! I snapped poor Mr. Chalk
in twoooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Urghh... It's all my fault! Mr. Chalk could've
written so much more in life! But I snapped that
life short!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! It's so sad—I can't go on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps Winning Ticket needs to learn how to
apply a little less force sometimes.
